{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323004205376893E1B65FAAB9710A"}"},"total":96},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7382825616772956990","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"在同类型里算优秀了，几乎没毒点。作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718952163,"group_id":"7371341301725269054","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyXwZrwAsaTVQfRBInWuM7XRDOy0vtowk/Ope7IqB9/0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2217051436891464","user_name":"青冥郁闷的舒言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2217051436891464","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7371341301725269054","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常】 【无CP】 【搞笑】 【温馨】 【下饭】
 
前世叶凡遭遇意外，被牛头马面压到地府，阎罗王大手一挥命运转变

全新身份——特级厨师，看他如何一边完成任务，一边享受人生


随机美食，随机摆摊地点，唯一相同点——特别好吃！

厕所隔壁卖包子，派出所门口卖龙虾，学校门口绿豆糕，写字楼下卖凉面……

“自己摊位上的东西都没卖出去，就去别人家吃包子！”

“老婆，那家的包子真的很香，我忍不住了，一次就好…”

“这么快就卖完了呀，老板，要不你回家补货，我们在原地等您？”

“老板，你家里缺钟点工吗？不要工钱管饭就行！”
